title: Scaffold internal/parse package with types, grammar loading, and BashParser
description: Create internal/parse package with go.mod, foundational types (ExtractedCommand, ParseResult, InlineScript, WarningCode), grammar loading (LangGrammar, SupportedLanguages, NewLangParser with sync.Pool), BashParser with sync.Pool parser pooling, Parse() with panic recovery and MaxInputSize guard, Tree wrapper. Unit tests: grammar loading, BashParser simple/compound/malformed, size boundary, concurrent stress test with -race.
